comments.author: @World_Untold_321
comments.text: Montana has a truly special place in my heart. Watching this in 4K brought back all the memories of driving through Glacier National Park and standing under that endless 'Big Sky'. It really feels like time stands still out there. Thank you for capturing its raw beauty so breathtakingly!

replies.author: @trueglobe66
replies.text: Thank you for sharing your personal connection to Montana; there really is something timeless about the wilderness there, isn't there? ✨

comments.author: @trueunrealglobe
comments.text: This is one of the few YouTube channels where I actually watch the credits because I don't want the journey to end too quickly.

replies.author: @trueglobe66
replies.text: Thank you so much for those kind words—we’re honored you enjoyed the journey that much! ✨

replies.author: @trueglobe66
replies.text: Which Canadian province do you think resembles Montana the most, and what makes it feel that way to you?

comments.author: @huyentrangnguyen1482
comments.text: I want to live here. I don't need to be boisterous.

replies.author: @trueunrealglobe
replies.text: Thank you for continuing to remind us that the world is far more extraordinary than we often realize. I can't wait to see where the next documentary takes us.

replies.author: @trueunrealglobe
replies.text: I love documentaries that encourage people to slow down and appreciate the world instead of rushing from one famous attraction to another.

comments.author: @trueglobe66
